body.title: Consolidation replay — integrate FACT_CLOUD nodes into graph topology
body.result: Consolidation replay implemented: quiet-period background source that discovers FACT_CLOUD nodes, groups by session, and strengthens co-occurrence edges. 8 tests passing, 337 total tests pass. Registered as push source in run_background_sources.
body.description:
Build a quiet-period habit that re-traverses recently deposited FACT_CLOUD nodes and strengthens co-occurrence edges between them. This is G-BIO-REPLAY1 and the prerequisite for Igor discussing Making Money coherently.

Spec (D228):
- Trigger: no user activity for 10 min AND unprocessed FACT_CLOUD nodes exist
- Query: SELECT nodes WHERE memory_type='FACTUAL' AND source='reading' AND id LIKE 'FACT_CLOUD_%' AND (last_replay_ts IS NULL OR timestamp > last_replay_ts)
- For each pair of nodes from the same reading session (same context tag or timestamp within 120s of each other): upsert interpretive_edge(src, dst, relation='co_deposited', weight+=0.1, cap=1.0)
- Track progress: store last_replay_ts as a PROCEDURAL memory node 'PROC_REPLAY_CURSOR'
- Max 50 node-pairs per pass to avoid blocking
- Log: forensic log each pass with nodes_processed, edges_created, edges_strengthened
- Inertia: LOW (new file, not touching brainstem)
- File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/replay.py (new) + register quiet-period habit in cognition/ne.py or a new background source
- Tests: test that edges are created between co-deposited nodes; test that cursor advances; test that max-pairs limit is respected
